//: First install the MCP extra into this clone's virtual environment:
Then register the server in Claude Code (user scope), replacing the placeholder paths:
claude mcp add-json agent_control_plane --scope user '<the mcpServers.agent_control_plane object below>'
or copy the mcpServers block into ~/.claude.json manually and restart Claude Code.
MCP_TOOL_TIMEOUT should stay above the default 25-second watch/plan-watch window.
